query: SELECT id, title, content FROM `safetyTopics` WHERE id = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 378BqZUfvZWHcSK.root --database dNJxctHZxj6wCg3jq4j4kh --execute SELECT id, title, content FROM `safetyTopics` WHERE id = 1;
messages: • Always use fall protection when working at heights of 6 feet or more
• Inspect harnesses, lanyards, and anchor points before each use
• Never alter or remove guardrails without authorization
• Know the difference between fall arrest, fall restraint, and positioning systems
Discussion: What fall hazards exist on our current job site? How can we eliminate or reduce them?
stdout:
id	title	content
1	Fall Protection Basics	Key Points:
• Always use fall protection when working at heights of 6 feet or more
• Inspect harnesses, lanyards, and anchor points before each use
• Never alter or remove guardrails without authorization
• Know the difference between fall arrest, fall restraint, and positioning systems
• Report damaged equipment immediately

Discussion: What fall hazards exist on our current job site? How can we eliminate or reduce them?
